response.reasoning: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement. He has deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB — all core to the role. His work at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, satisfying the AI agent development requirement. He has used Vitest indirectly via Jest/TDD culture and has strong testing discipline (TDD, CI/CD, test runners he built). He has extensive cloud experience (AWS CDK), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and Git proficiency. His background includes Java and Kotlin via DLang interop and embedded systems work. He has led architecture decisions across multiple companies and built scalable systems handling millions of requests. His open-source contributions and workshops demonstrate strong communication and process improvement skills. The only gaps are minimal explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest (though he uses equivalent tools), and German language is only basic, though not required. His education is a BS in CS, meeting the degree requirement.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js/React proficiency
Proven AI-agent infrastructure development and experience with agentic workflows
Deep expertise in testing, CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud platforms (AWS)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume (though equivalent tools used)
German language is only basic, may hinder local collaboration in Berlin-based team
Some roles involved DLang and embedded systems, which may suggest fragmented focus
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds all core requirements with deep full-stack experience, proven AI-agent work, and strong architecture/testing discipline. His stack aligns closely with the role despite minor gaps in Nest.js/Vitest exposure, which are easily bridgeable given his mastery of equivalent tools. His open-source leadership and process improvements make him a high-impact individual contributor.
